TIME.content:
<svg viewBox="0 0 400 500" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <rect x="0" y="0" width="400" height="500" fill="#141414" rx="16"/>
  <g id="character">
    <!-- Torso -->
    <path d="M150,350 Q200,300 250,350" fill="#3C78B4" stroke="#2D2319" stroke-width="2"/>
    <!-- Head -->
    <circle cx="200" cy="150" r="50" fill="#E1B48C" stroke="#2D2319" stroke-width="2"/>
    <!-- Hair -->
    <ellipse cx="200" cy="125" rx="40" ry="20" fill="#352D28"/>
    <!-- Eyes -->
    <circle cx="185" cy="140" r="8" fill="#fff"/>
    <circle cx="215" cy="140" r="8" fill="#fff"/>
    <circle cx="185" cy="140" r="4" fill="#3E2F1C"/>
    <circle cx="215" cy="140" r="4" fill="#3E2F1C"/>
    <circle cx="185" cy="140" r="2" fill="#000"/>
    <circle cx="215" cy="140" r="2" fill="#000"/>
    <circle cx="187" cy="138" r="1" fill="#fff"/>
    <circle cx="217" cy="138" r="1" fill="#fff"/>
    <!-- Smile -->
    <path d="M185,165 Q200,175 215,165" stroke="#C47A6A" stroke-width="2" fill="none"/>
  </g>
  <g id="left-arm">
    <g id="left-forearm" transform="translate(150, 300)">
      <path d="M0,0 Q-10,30 0,60" fill="#E1B48C" stroke="#2D2319" stroke-width="2"/>
      <g id="left-hand" transform="translate(0, 60)">
        <path d="M0,0 Q-10,10 -10,30 Q0,40 10,30 Q20,10 10,0 Z" fill="#E1B48C" stroke="#2D2319" stroke-width="2"/>
        <!-- Fingers -->
        <path d="M-8,10 Q-12,0 -8,-10" fill="#E1B48C" stroke="#2D2319" stroke-width="2"/>
        <path d="M-4,10 Q-6,0 -4,-10" fill="#E1B48C" stroke="#2D2319" stroke-width="2"/>
        <path d="M0,10 Q-2,0 0,-10" fill="#E1B48C" stroke="#2D2319" stroke-width="2"/>
        <path d="M4,10 Q6,0 4,-10" fill="#E1B48C" stroke="#2D2319" stroke-width="2"/>
        <path d="M8,10 Q12,0 8,-10" fill="#E1B48C" stroke="#2D2319" stroke-width="2"/>
      </g>
    </g>
  </g>
  <g id="right-arm">
    <g id="right-forearm" transform="translate(250, 300)">
      <path d="M0,0 Q10,30 0,60" fill="#E1B48C" stroke="#2D2319" stroke-width="2"/>
      <g id="right-hand" transform="translate(0, 60)">
        <path d="M0,0 Q10,10 10,30 Q0,40 -10,30 Q-20,10 -10,0 Z" fill="#E1B48C" stroke="#2D2319" stroke-width="2"/>
        <!-- Fingers -->
        <path d="M8,10 Q12,0 8,-10" fill="#E1B48C" stroke="#2D2319" stroke-width="2"/>
        <path d="M4,10 Q6,0 4,-10" fill="#E1B48C" stroke="#2D2319" stroke-width="2"/>
        <path d="M0,10 Q-2,0 0,-10" fill="#E1B48C" stroke="#2D2319" stroke-width="2"/>
        <path d="M-4,10 Q-6,0 -4,-10" fill="#E1B48C" stroke="#2D2319" stroke-width="2"/>
        <path d="M-8,10 Q-12,0 -8,-10" fill="#E1B48C" stroke="#2D2319" stroke-width="2"/>
      </g>
    </g>
  </g>
  <style>
    @keyframes moveLeftArm {
      0% { transform: translate(150px, 300px) rotate(0deg); }
      100% { transform: translate(130px, 250px) rotate(-45deg); }
    }
    @keyframes moveRightArm {
      0% { transform: translate(250px, 300px) rotate(0deg); }
      100% { transform: translate(270px, 250px) rotate(45deg); }
    }
    #left-forearm {
      animation: moveLeftArm 0.8s ease-in-out forwards;
    }
    #right-forearm {
      animation: moveRightArm 0.8s ease-in-out forwards;
    }
  </style>
</svg>

<svg viewBox="0 0 400 500" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <style>
    @keyframes leftArmMove {
      0% { transform: translate(0, 0) rotate(0deg); }
      100% { transform: translate(-40px, -20px) rotate(-15deg); }
    }
    @keyframes rightArmMove {
      0% { transform: translate(0, 0) rotate(0deg); }
      100% { transform: translate(40px, -20px) rotate(15deg); }
    }
    @keyframes leftHandMove {
      0% { transform: translate(0, 0) rotate(0deg); }
      100% { transform: translate(-20px, -10px) rotate(-15deg); }
    }
    @keyframes rightHandMove {
      0% { transform: translate(0, 0) rotate(0deg); }
      100% { transform: translate(20px, -10px) rotate(15deg); }
    }
  </style>
  <rect x="0" y="0" width="400" height="500" fill="#141414" rx="16"/>
  <g>
    <circle cx="200" cy="150" r="50" fill="#E1B48C" stroke="#2D2319" stroke-width="2"/>
    <path d="M170,140 C170,130 180,120 200,120 C220,120 230,130 230,140" fill="#352D28"/>
    <circle cx="185" cy="145" r="5" fill="#fff"/>
    <circle cx="185" cy="145" r="3" fill="#3E2F1C"/>
    <circle cx="185" cy="145" r="1" fill="#000"/>
    <circle cx="215" cy="145" r="5" fill="#fff"/>
    <circle cx="215" cy="145" r="3" fill="#3E2F1C"/>
    <circle cx="215" cy="145" r="1" fill="#000"/>
    <path d="M190,170 Q200,180 210,170" stroke="#C47A6A" stroke-width="2" fill="none"/>
    <rect x="150" y="200" width="100" height="150" fill="#3C78B4" stroke="#2D2319" stroke-width="2"/>
  </g>
  <g style="animation: leftArmMove 0.8s ease-in-out forwards;">
    <path d="M150,250 Q130,300 120,350" fill="#E1B48C" stroke="#2D2319" stroke-width="2"/>
  </g>
  <g style="animation: rightArmMove 0.8s ease-in-out forwards;">
    <path d="M250,250 Q270,300 280,350" fill="#E1B48C" stroke="#2D2319" stroke-width="2"/>
  </g>
  <g style="animation: leftHandMove 0.8s ease-in-out forwards;">
    <path d="M110,350 Q100,360 110,370 Q120,380 130,370 Q140,360 130,350 Z" fill="#E1B48C" stroke="#2D2319" stroke-width="2"/>
    <path d="M115,355 C115,350 120,345 125,350" fill="#E1B48C" stroke="#2D2319" stroke-width="2"/>
    <path d="M120,360 C120,355 125,350 130,355" fill="#E1B48C" stroke="#2D2319" stroke-width="2"/>
  </g>
  <g style="animation: rightHandMove 0.8s ease-in-out forwards;">
    <path d="M290,350 Q300,360 290,370 Q280,380 270,370 Q260,360 270,350 Z" fill="#E1B48C" stroke="#2D2319" stroke-width="2"/>
    <path d="M285,355 C285,350 280,345 275,350" fill="#E1B48C" stroke="#2D2319" stroke-width="2"/>
    <path d="M280,360 C280,355 275,350 270,355" fill="#E1B48C" stroke="#2D2319" stroke-width="2"/>
  </g>
</svg>

<svg viewBox="0 0 400 500" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <style>
    @keyframes leftArmMove {
      0% { transform: translate(0, 0) rotate(0deg); }
      100% { transform: translate(-10px, -20px) rotate(-10deg); }
    }
    @keyframes rightArmMove {
      0% { transform: translate(0, 0) rotate(0deg); }
      100% { transform: translate(10px, -20px) rotate(10deg); }
    }
    @keyframes leftHandMove {
      0% { transform: translate(0, 0) rotate(0deg); }
      100% { transform: translate(-10px, -30px) rotate(-10deg); }
    }
    @keyframes rightHandMove {
      0% { transform: translate(0, 0) rotate(0deg); }
      100% { transform: translate(10px, -30px) rotate(10deg); }
    }
  </style>
  <rect x="0" y="0" width="400" height="500" fill="#141414" rx="16"/>
  <g>
    <circle cx="200" cy="150" r="50" fill="#E1B48C" stroke="#2D2319" stroke-width="2"/>
    <path d="M180 140 Q200 130 220 140" fill="none" stroke="#C47A6A" stroke-width="2"/>
    <circle cx="185" cy="145" r="5" fill="#FFF" stroke="#2D2319" stroke-width="2"/>
    <circle cx="215" cy="145" r="5" fill="#FFF" stroke="#2D2319" stroke-width="2"/>
    <circle cx="185" cy="145" r="2" fill="#3E2F1C"/>
    <circle cx="215" cy="145" r="2" fill="#3E2F1C"/>
    <circle cx="184" cy="144" r="1" fill="#FFF"/>
    <circle cx="214" cy="144" r="1" fill="#FFF"/>
    <path d="M150 100 Q200 80 250 100" fill="#352D28" stroke="#2D2319" stroke-width="2"/>
    <rect x="150" y="200" width="100" height="150" fill="#3C78B4" stroke="#2D2319" stroke-width="2"/>
  </g>
  <g style="animation: leftArmMove 0.8s ease-in-out forwards;">
    <path d="M150 250 Q140 300 120 350" fill="#E1B48C" stroke="#2D2319" stroke-width="2"/>
  </g>
  <g style="animation: rightArmMove 0.8s ease-in-out forwards;">
    <path d="M250 250 Q260 300 280 350" fill="#E1B48C" stroke="#2D2319" stroke-width="2"/>
  </g>
  <g style="animation: leftHandMove 0.8s ease-in-out forwards;">
    <path d="M110 350 Q100 370 120 390" fill="#E1B48C" stroke="#2D2319" stroke-width="2"/>
    <path d="M115 355 Q110 360 115 365" fill="#E1B48C" stroke="#2D2319" stroke-width="2"/>
    <path d="M120 355 Q115 360 120 365" fill="#E1B48C" stroke="#2D2319" stroke-width="2"/>
    <path d="M125 355 Q120 360 125 365" fill="#E1B48C" stroke="#2D2319" stroke-width="2"/>
    <path d="M130 355 Q125 360 130 365" fill="#E1B48C" stroke="#2D2319" stroke-width="2"/>
    <path d="M135 355 Q130 360 135 365" fill="#E1B48C" stroke="#2D2319" stroke-width="2"/>
  </g>
  <g style="animation: rightHandMove 0.8s ease-in-out forwards;">
    <path d="M290 350 Q300 370 280 390" fill="#E1B48C" stroke="#2D2319" stroke-width="2"/>
    <path d="M285 355 Q290 360 285 365" fill="#E1B48C" stroke="#2D2319" stroke-width="2"/>
    <path d="M280 355 Q285 360 280 365" fill="#E1B48C" stroke="#2D2319" stroke-width="2"/>
    <path d="M275 355 Q280 360 275 365" fill="#E1B48C" stroke="#2D2319" stroke-width="2"/>
    <path d="M270 355 Q275 360 270 365" fill="#E1B48C" stroke="#2D2319" stroke-width="2"/>
    <path d="M265 355 Q270 360 265 365" fill="#E1B48C" stroke="#2D2319" stroke-width="2"/>
  </g>
</svg>

<svg viewBox="0 0 400 500" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <style>
    @keyframes leftArmMove {
      0% { transform: translate(0, 0) rotate(0deg); }
      100% { transform: translate(-40px, -20px) rotate(-30deg); }
    }
    @keyframes rightArmMove {
      0% { transform: translate(0, 0) rotate(0deg); }
      100% { transform: translate(40px, -20px) rotate(30deg); }
    }
    @keyframes leftHandMove {
      0% { transform: translate(0, 0) rotate(0deg); }
      100% { transform: translate(-40px, -20px) rotate(-30deg); }
    }
    @keyframes rightHandMove {
      0% { transform: translate(0, 0) rotate(0deg); }
      100% { transform: translate(40px, -20px) rotate(30deg); }
    }
  </style>
  <rect x="0" y="0" width="400" height="500" fill="#141414" rx="16"/>
  <!-- Static elements -->
  <g id="character">
    <circle cx="200" cy="150" r="50" fill="#E1B48C" stroke="#2D2319" stroke-width="2"/>
    <path d="M170,140 Q200,180 230,140" fill="#E1B48C" stroke="#2D2319" stroke-width="2"/>
    <circle cx="185" cy="140" r="5" fill="#fff"/>
    <circle cx="185" cy="140" r="3" fill="#3E2F1C"/>
    <circle cx="215" cy="140" r="5" fill="#fff"/>
    <circle cx="215" cy="140" r="3" fill="#3E2F1C"/>
    <path d="M190,165 Q200,175 210,165" fill="none" stroke="#C47A6A" stroke-width="2"/>
    <path d="M150,100 Q200,80 250,100" fill="#352D28"/>
    <rect x="150" y="200" width="100" height="150" fill="#3C78B4" stroke="#2D2319" stroke-width="2"/>
  </g>
  <!-- Animated elements -->
  <g id="leftArm" style="animation: leftArmMove 0.8s ease-in-out forwards;">
    <path d="M150,250 Q140,300 130,350" fill="#E1B48C" stroke="#2D2319" stroke-width="2"/>
  </g>
  <g id="rightArm" style="animation: rightArmMove 0.8s ease-in-out forwards;">
    <path d="M250,250 Q260,300 270,350" fill="#E1B48C" stroke="#2D2319" stroke-width="2"/>
  </g>
  <g id="leftHand" style="animation: leftHandMove 0.8s ease-in-out forwards;">
    <path d="M120,350 Q110,360 120,370" fill="#E1B48C" stroke="#2D2319" stroke-width="2"/>
    <circle cx="115" cy="360" r="4" fill="#E1B48C" stroke="#2D2319" stroke-width="2"/>
  </g>
  <g id="rightHand" style="animation: rightHandMove 0.8s ease-in-out forwards;">
    <path d="M280,350 Q290,360 280,370" fill="#E1B48C" stroke="#2D2319" stroke-width="2"/>
    <circle cx="285" cy="360" r="4" fill="#E1B48C" stroke="#2D2319" stroke-width="2"/>
  </g>
</svg>

<svg viewBox="0 0 400 500" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <style>
    @keyframes moveLeftArm {
      0% { transform: translate(0px, 0px) rotate(0deg); }
      100% { transform: translate(-50px, 20px) rotate(-30deg); }
    }
    @keyframes moveRightArm {
      0% { transform: translate(0px, 0px) rotate(0deg); }
      100% { transform: translate(50px, 20px) rotate(30deg); }
    }
    @keyframes moveLeftHand {
      0% { transform: translate(0px, 0px) rotate(0deg); }
      100% { transform: translate(-10px, 0px) rotate(-10deg); }
    }
    @keyframes moveRightHand {
      0% { transform: translate(0px, 0px) rotate(0deg); }
      100% { transform: translate(10px, 0px) rotate(10deg); }
    }
  </style>
  <rect x="0" y="0" width="400" height="500" fill="#141414" rx="16"/>
  <g id="character">
    <!-- Torso -->
    <path d="M150 300 Q200 250 250 300 L250 400 L150 400 Z" fill="#3C78B4" stroke="#2D2319" stroke-width="2"/>
    <!-- Head -->
    <circle cx="200" cy="150" r="50" fill="#E1B48C" stroke="#2D2319" stroke-width="2"/>
    <!-- Hair -->
    <path d="M150 120 Q200 80 250 120" fill="#352D28" stroke="#2D2319" stroke-width="2"/>
    <!-- Eyes -->
    <circle cx="180" cy="140" r="5" fill="#FFFFFF"/>
    <circle cx="180" cy="140" r="3" fill="#3E2F1C"/>
    <circle cx="180" cy="140" r="1" fill="#000000"/>
    <circle cx="220" cy="140" r="5" fill="#FFFFFF"/>
    <circle cx="220" cy="140" r="3" fill="#3E2F1C"/>
    <circle cx="220" cy="140" r="1" fill="#000000"/>
    <!-- Smile -->
    <path d="M180 170 Q200 180 220 170" fill="none" stroke="#C47A6A" stroke-width="2"/>
    <!-- Arms -->
    <g id="leftArm" style="animation: moveLeftArm 0.8s ease-in-out forwards;">
      <path d="M150 300 Q140 260 100 280" fill="#E1B48C" stroke="#2D2319" stroke-width="2"/>
    </g>
    <g id="rightArm" style="animation: moveRightArm 0.8s ease-in-out forwards;">
      <path d="M250 300 Q260 260 300 280" fill="#E1B48C" stroke="#2D2319" stroke-width="2"/>
    </g>
    <!-- Hands -->
    <g id="leftHand" style="animation: moveLeftHand 0.8s ease-in-out forwards;">
      <path d="M90 275 Q85 265 75 275 Q80 285 90 275" fill="#E1B48C" stroke="#2D2319" stroke-width="2"/>
    </g>
    <g id="rightHand" style="animation: moveRightHand 0.8s ease-in-out forwards;">
      <path d="M310 275 Q315 265 325 275 Q320 285 310 275" fill="#E1B48C" stroke="#2D2319" stroke-width="2"/>
    </g>
  </g>
</svg>

<svg viewBox="0 0 400 500" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <style>
    @keyframes leftArmMove {
      0% { transform: translate(0px, 0px) rotate(0deg); }
      100% { transform: translate(-20px, -30px) rotate(-15deg); }
    }
    @keyframes rightArmMove {
      0% { transform: translate(0px, 0px) rotate(0deg); }
      100% { transform: translate(20px, -30px) rotate(15deg); }
    }
    @keyframes leftHandMove {
      0% { transform: translate(0px, 0px) rotate(0deg); }
      100% { transform: translate(-10px, -20px) rotate(-10deg); }
    }
    @keyframes rightHandMove {
      0% { transform: translate(0px, 0px) rotate(0deg); }
      100% { transform: translate(10px, -20px) rotate(10deg); }
    }
  </style>

  <rect x="0" y="0" width="400" height="500" fill="#141414" rx="16" />
  
  <!-- Torso -->
  <path d="M150,300 Q200,250 250,300 Q250,450 150,450 Z" fill="#3C78B4" stroke="#2D2319" stroke-width="2" />
  
  <!-- Head -->
  <circle cx="200" cy="150" r="50" fill="#E1B48C" stroke="#2D2319" stroke-width="2" />
  
  <!-- Hair -->
  <path d="M150,120 Q200,80 250,120 Q240,90 160,90 Z" fill="#352D28" stroke="#2D2319" stroke-width="2" />
  
  <!-- Eyes -->
  <circle cx="180" cy="140" r="10" fill="#FFF" />
  <circle cx="220" cy="140" r="10" fill="#FFF" />
  <circle cx="180" cy="140" r="5" fill="#3E2F1C" />
  <circle cx="220" cy="140" r="5" fill="#3E2F1C" />
  <circle cx="182" cy="138" r="2" fill="#000" />
  <circle cx="222" cy="138" r="2" fill="#000" />
  
  <!-- Smile -->
  <path d="M180,170 Q200,190 220,170" stroke="#C47A6A" stroke-width="2" fill="none" />
  
  <!-- Left Arm -->
  <g style="animation: leftArmMove 0.8s ease-in-out forwards;">
    <path d="M150,300 Q130,350 140,400" fill="#E1B48C" stroke="#2D2319" stroke-width="2" />
  </g>
  
  <!-- Right Arm -->
  <g style="animation: rightArmMove 0.8s ease-in-out forwards;">
    <path d="M250,300 Q270,350 260,400" fill="#E1B48C" stroke="#2D2319" stroke-width="2" />
  </g>
  
  <!-- Left Hand -->
  <g style="animation: leftHandMove 0.8s ease-in-out forwards;">
    <path d="M140,400 Q130,420 150,430 Q170,420 160,400 Z" fill="#E1B48C" stroke="#2D2319" stroke-width="2" />
    <circle cx="145" cy="410" r="5" fill="#E1B48C" stroke="#2D2319" stroke-width="2" />
    <circle cx="155" cy="415" r="5" fill="#E1B48C" stroke="#2D2319" stroke-width="2" />
  </g>
  
  <!-- Right Hand -->
  <g style="animation: rightHandMove 0.8s ease-in-out forwards;">
    <path d="M260,400 Q270,420 250,430 Q230,420 240,400 Z" fill="#E1B48C" stroke="#2D2319" stroke-width="2" />
    <circle cx="255" cy="410" r="5" fill="#E1B48C" stroke="#2D2319" stroke-width="2" />
    <circle cx="245" cy="415" r="5" fill="#E1B48C" stroke="#2D2319" stroke-width="2" />
  </g>
</svg>

HELLO.content:
<svg viewBox="0 0 400 500" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <style>
    @keyframes wave-arm {
      0% { transform: translate(0, 0) rotate(0deg); }
      100% { transform: translate(-20px, -30px) rotate(-20deg); }
    }
    @keyframes wave-hand {
      0% { transform: translate(0, 0) rotate(0deg); }
      100% { transform: translate(0, 0) rotate(20deg); }
    }
  </style>
  <rect x="0" y="0" width="400" height="500" fill="#141414" rx="16"/>
  <!-- Static elements -->
  <circle cx="200" cy="150" r="50" fill="#E1B48C" stroke="#2D2319" stroke-width="2"/>
  <path d="M160 140 Q200 180 240 140" fill="#352D28" stroke="#2D2319" stroke-width="2"/>
  <circle cx="185" cy="140" r="5" fill="#fff"/>
  <circle cx="215" cy="140" r="5" fill="#fff"/>
  <circle cx="184" cy="140" r="2" fill="#3E2F1C"/>
  <circle cx="214" cy="140" r="2" fill="#3E2F1C"/>
  <circle cx="184" cy="138" r="1" fill="#fff"/>
  <circle cx="214" cy="138" r="1" fill="#fff"/>
  <path d="M190 160 Q200 170 210 160" stroke="#C47A6A" stroke-width="2" fill="none"/>
  <rect x="150" y="200" width="100" height="150" fill="#3C78B4" stroke="#2D2319" stroke-width="2"/>
  <!-- Animated elements -->
  <g id="left-arm" style="animation: wave-arm 0.8s ease-in-out forwards;">
    <path d="M150 250 Q120 280 130 320" fill="#E1B48C" stroke="#2D2319" stroke-width="2"/>
    <g id="left-hand" style="animation: wave-hand 0.8s ease-in-out forwards;">
      <path d="M130 320 Q120 340 140 350" fill="#E1B48C" stroke="#2D2319" stroke-width="2"/>
      <path d="M135 325 Q130 330 135 335" fill="#E1B48C" stroke="#2D2319" stroke-width="2"/>
      <path d="M138 328 Q133 333 138 338" fill="#E1B48C" stroke="#2D2319" stroke-width="2"/>
      <path d="M141 331 Q136 336 141 341" fill="#E1B48C" stroke="#2D2319" stroke-width="2"/>
      <path d="M144 334 Q139 339 144 344" fill="#E1B48C" stroke="#2D2319" stroke-width="2"/>
    </g>
  </g>
  <g id="right-arm">
    <path d="M250 250 Q280 280 270 320" fill="#E1B48C" stroke="#2D2319" stroke-width="2"/>
    <g id="right-hand">
      <path d="M270 320 Q280 340 260 350" fill="#E1B48C" stroke="#2D2319" stroke-width="2"/>
      <path d="M265 325 Q270 330 265 335" fill="#E1B48C" stroke="#2D2319" stroke-width="2"/>
      <path d="M262 328 Q267 333 262 338" fill="#E1B48C" stroke="#2D2319" stroke-width="2"/>
      <path d="M259 331 Q264 336 259 341" fill="#E1B48C" stroke="#2D2319" stroke-width="2"/>
      <path d="M256 334 Q261 339 256 344" fill="#E1B48C" stroke="#2D2319" stroke-width="2"/>
    </g>
  </g>
</svg>
